html:
GenericHotGasMiasma

“These vents can billow out more than mere heat.”

-

Fumaroles are volcanic geysers generated in the Fumarole Biome. They will emit heat that, if care is not taken, can cause Overheating for the Survivors. Sometimes they play an animation of a blast of air being released.

Contents

  • 1 Rift
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Rift

This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift
While the Shadow Rift is active, Fumaroles start spawning Miasma around themselves. When the Shadow Rift closes, they return to their normal state.

Trivia

  • In the game files there is a variant of the Fumarole that freezes players and Fumarole that spawns Toadstool's spores.

Assets

  • Normal
  • Normal Rift
  • Medium
  • Medium Rift
  • Small
  • Small Rift
  • Normal Old
  • Normal Old Rift
  • Medium Old
  • Medium Old Rift
  • Small Old
  • Small Old Rift

Gallery

  • Fumarole Biome Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Fumaroles Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Fumaroles Concept Animation from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • On Concept Art for trailer from Rhymes with Play stream.

Fumarole

Source

Miscellaneous
"cave_vent_rock"
"cave_vent_rock_med"
"cave_vent_rock_low"
GenericHotGasMiasma
“I'm not sure which way it vent.”
–Wilson
“I don't trust it.”
–Willow
“Is how ground breathe.”
–Wolfgang
“There's nothing coming out... for now.”
–Wendy
“PRIMITIVE VENTILATION SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“Fumarole from which a number of gasses may emerge. Best steer clear.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather not wait around.”
–Woodie
“I don't like the looks of it.”
–Maxwell
“What cömeth may bring naught but ruin.”
–Wigfrid
“What's in there?”
–Webber
“I do not wish to wait for what comes out!”
–Warly
“No stink now”
–Wormwood
“Ain't nothin' good comin' out of there.”
–Winona
“What will rise, shall be a surprise!”
–Wortox
“Stinky rock holes.”
–Wurt
“Not too close, Wobes.”
–Walter
“Let's go around those, shall we?”
–Wanda
“Things are really heating up.”
–Wilson
“I prefer a dry heat.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang love sauna.”
–Wolfgang
“I prefer the cold's quiet embrace.”
–Wendy
“OVERHEAT WARNING”
–WX-78
“Merely geothermal steam venting from a fumarole. One needn't be alarmed.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not cut out for this climate.”
–Woodie
“Ugh, really? I'm already uncomfortable.”
–Maxwell
“There is nö furnace nör fröst that shall halt my spear!”
–Wigfrid
“It's too hot!”
–Webber
“Steaming as a method of cooking preserves nutrients and flavor!”
–Warly
“Hot water smoke?”
–Wormwood
“It's gonna get real stuffy down here.”
–Winona
“Fear not, team! Just hot steam.”
–Wortox
“So hot, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's just blowing off steam! Get it, Woby?”
–Walter
“I feel sluggish in this heat.”
–Wanda
“That's exhausting.”
–Wilson
“Oof! That reeks!”
–Willow
“Like Wolfgang when he eat too much protein!”
–Wolfgang
“That's unpleasant.”
–Wendy
“WARNING: RISK OF ORGANIC RESOURCE CORRUPTION”
–WX-78
“Those fumes are harmful to inhale and will cause spoilage to perishables.”
–Wickerbottom
“Did you catch a whiff of that, Luce?”
–Woodie
“Blegh! That stinks!”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a fetör that döth öffend thy very senses!”
–Wigfrid
“We don't like that smell.”
–Webber
“Reminds me of rotten eggs.”
–Warly
“Bad smell!”
–Wormwood
“Smells kinda rotten.”
–Winona
“Rather stinks, me thinks.”
–Wortox
“Florp! Rude!”
–Wurt
“Yuck! Stay back, Woby girl!”
–Walter
“Oh that dreadful, noxious odor.”
–Wanda
“What about miasma?”
–Wilson
“Just hear me out... Fire. Trust me.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang hate dark yucky cloud.”
–Wolfgang
“One could drown in that black fog.”
–Wendy
“WARNING: USER MAY EXPERIENCE LAG”
–WX-78
“Prudence dictates minimizing exposure to that most insidious vapor.”
–Wickerbottom
“Smells like trouble.”
–Woodie
“No, thank you.”
–Maxwell
“Cursed fög öf pestilence!”
–Wigfrid
“It makes us feel sick.”
–Webber
“It smells of death and disease!”
–Warly
“Danger stinky!”
–Wormwood
“Well that's just toxic.”
–Winona
“Inhale that plume, embrace your doom!”
–Wortox
“Flort! Bad cloud!”
–Wurt
“Steer clear, Wobers!”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, I've no desire to wade through that vile substance.”
–Wanda
“These vents can billow out more than mere heat.”
-
Fumaroles are volcanic geysers generated in the Fumarole Biome. They will emit heat that, if care is not taken, can cause Overheating for the Survivors. Sometimes they play an animation of a blast of air being released.

3 Assets

This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift
While the Shadow Rift is active, Fumaroles start spawning Miasma around themselves. When the Shadow Rift closes, they return to their normal state.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
In the game files there is a variant of the Fumarole that freezes players and Fumarole that spawns Toadstool's spores.
